chunks.title: Siege and Fall of Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Describes the siege, the king's flight, capture, and blinding.

chunks.title: Destruction of the City
chunks.reason: Details the burning of buildings, tearing down walls, and exile of people.

chunks.title: Plunder and Execution
chunks.reason: Catalogs the bronze vessels taken and lists the officials executed.

chunks.title: Gedaliah's Governorship
chunks.reason: Narrates the appointment of Gedaliah and his subsequent assassination.

chunks.title: Release of Jehoiachin
chunks.reason: Describes the elevation of King Jehoiachin in Babylon.
